text.tspan: Local verification, GitHub Actions gates, E2E scope, mobile builds, deploy safety, and feedback loops
ignored by the main CI path
api:lint/typecheck. Mobile: nx lint mobile + tsc
pull_request and push to main. PR
Before merge: read gh pr diff, check gh pr
checks, triage automated review comments, and fix
checkout with base branch for PR diff
Nx daemon disabled for deterministic CI
DATABASE_URL points at local CI Postgres
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector
Clean stale tsbuildinfo and dist outputs
pnpm exec nx run-many -t lint test typecheck
Self-healing CI logs fix proposals on failure
Required checks gate PR merge policy
Nx Cloud hooks are present for future
Failed checks feed reviewer and fix
Concurrency cancels stale branch E2E runs
db:push in this suite only; migration
Caches APK and Gradle; injects fresh JS on cache hit
Runs Android emulator and Maestro smoke/nightly tags
Uploads screenshots, failure screen, and logcat
push main after CI main passes
Runs only when mobile or schemas changed
Publishes EAS Update to preview channel
Warns that native changes need full EAS
Manual dispatch can lint/test and build
Native changes build Android preview APK
Push main: lightweight lint + typecheck because CI
Manual deploy: adds API unit and integration tests
Quality gate always precedes API deploy
Reports make failures reviewable instead of opaque
Sentry and Cloudflare logs after deploy
Helpful, but not a substitute for review protocol
Changed code is not fixed code
Run related tests, lint, and typecheck
gh pr diff shows the actual changed files
gh pr checks must pass, including automated review signals
Review comments are triaged by severity before merge
Source: .github/workflows/{ci,e2e-ci,e2e-web,mobile-ci,deploy,claude-code-review,claude}.yml and AGENTS.md validation rules. Counts snapshot: 2026-05-01.
